name: MASALA CHICKPEA TOAST
intro: My go-to breakfast, this toast is something I heart more than an avocado toast. Protein-rich, spiced-up chickpea smash is smeared on toasted sourdough. The result is a dish that so delicious, you’ll want to have it for breakfast and lunch and dinner!

ingredients.item: coriander leaves (finely chopped and with stems)

method: Toast the sourdough slices and brush them with 1 tsp each of olive oil.
In a bowl, mix all the other ingredients and smash them with the back of your spoon.
To serve, layer the toast with this chickpea smash and serve warm.
